---
title: "3. Cell Type Deconvolution -- Exercise-Induced Transcriptomic Remodeling in an MPTP Mouse Model of Parkinson’s Disease"
author: "Erika Li"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

```{r library loading}
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(reshape2)
library(Seurat)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(S4Vectors)
library(MuSiC)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
```


```{r GEO data load}
# read raw single-cell counts from GSE82187, "Cellular Taxonomy of the Mouse Striatum as Revealed by Single-Cell RNAseq"
sc_counts_raw <- read.csv("../raw_data/GSE82187.csv.gz", row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
sc_counts_raw <- as.data.frame(sc_counts_raw)

# make cell name into row names
rownames(sc_counts_raw) <- sc_counts_raw$cell.name
sc_counts_raw$cell.name <- NULL

# pick metadata columns in the single-cell CSV
meta_cols <- c("type", "experiment", "protocol")
meta_cols <- intersect(meta_cols, colnames(sc_counts_raw))
sc_meta <- as.data.frame(sc_counts_raw[, meta_cols, drop = FALSE], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
rownames(sc_meta) <- rownames(sc_counts_raw)

# expression columns are the rest
expr_df <- sc_counts_raw %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(meta_cols))

expr_mat_genes_cells <- t(as.matrix(apply(expr_df, 2, as.numeric)))
rownames(expr_mat_genes_cells) <- make.unique(colnames(expr_df))
colnames(expr_mat_genes_cells) <- rownames(expr_df)

# createSeuratObject expects counts matrix with genes in rows and cells in columns
seurat_ref <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = expr_mat_genes_cells,
                                 project = "GSE82187",
                                 min.cells = 3,
                                 min.features = 200)

seurat_ref <- AddMetaData(seurat_ref, metadata = sc_meta)
head(seurat_ref@meta.data)
```

```{r cleaned metadata and counts dataframe load}
# read our metadata and bulk counts 
metadata <- readRDS(file = "../clean_data/cleaned_metadata.RDS")
counts_mat <- readRDS(file = "../clean_data/cleaned_counts_matrix.RDS")
```

```{r single cell experiment}
# extract counts and metadata from Seurat
seurat_counts <- as.matrix(GetAssayData(seurat_ref, slot = "counts"))
seurat_meta   <- seurat_ref@meta.data

# build SingleCellExperiment with a counts assay
sce_ref <- SingleCellExperiment(
  assays = list(counts = seurat_counts),
  colData = S4Vectors::DataFrame(seurat_meta)
)
```

```{r converting symbols to ensembl IDs}
sc_symbols <- rownames(sce_ref)
map_df <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  org.Mm.eg.db,
  keys = sc_symbols,
  keytype = "SYMBOL",
  columns = c("SYMBOL", "ENSEMBL")
)

# remove NAs and keep first mapping per symbol (if multiple)
map_df <- map_df[!is.na(map_df$ENSEMBL), ]
map_unique <- map_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(SYMBOL) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

symbol_to_ens <- setNames(map_unique$ENSEMBL, map_unique$SYMBOL)

# apply mapping to SCE rows
mapped <- symbol_to_ens[rownames(sce_ref)]
mapped_idx <- which(!is.na(mapped))
sce_ref_mapped <- sce_ref[mapped_idx, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(sce_ref_mapped) <- make.unique(mapped[mapped_idx])

# ensure numeric
bulk_mtx <- apply(counts_mat, 2, as.numeric)
bulk_mtx <- as.matrix(bulk_mtx)
rownames(bulk_mtx) <- rownames(counts_mat)

# intersection of genes
common_genes <- intersect(rownames(bulk_mtx), rownames(sce_ref_mapped))

# subset both to common genes 
sce_ref_final <- sce_ref_mapped[common_genes, , drop = FALSE]
bulk_mtx_final <- bulk_mtx[common_genes, , drop = FALSE]
```

```{r jitter plot}
colData(sce_ref_final)$subject <- rownames(colData(sce_ref_final))


Est.prop.MuSiC = music_prop(bulk.mtx = bulk_mtx_final , 
                            sc.sce = sce_ref_final, 
                            clusters = 'type', 
                            samples = 'subject', 
                            select.ct = NULL)

jitter.fig = Jitter_Est(
  list(data.matrix(Est.prop.MuSiC$Est.prop.weighted), 
       data.matrix(Est.prop.MuSiC$Est.prop.allgene)), 
  method.name = c('MuSiC', 'NNLS'), 
  title = 'Jitter plot of Estimated Cell Proportions'
)
print(jitter.fig)
ggsave(
  filename = "../results/figures/cell_type_plots/cell_type_jitter_plot.png",
  plot = jitter.fig,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r boxplots}
est_props <- as.data.frame(Est.prop.MuSiC$Est.prop.weighted)
est_props$sample <- rownames(est_props)
metadata$Sample <- rownames(metadata)
rownames(est_props) <- est_props$sample
est_props$sample <- NULL

props_long <- melt(as.matrix(est_props))
colnames(props_long) <- c("Sample", "CellType", "Proportion")
props_long <- left_join(props_long, metadata, by = "Sample")

for_plot <- props_long %>%
  filter(CellType == "Neuron")
for_plot$group<- factor(for_plot$group,
  levels = c("control_no_exercise",
             "control_exercise",
             "MPTP_no_exercise",
             "MPTP_exercise"))

# plot neuron proportion
neuron_plot <- ggplot(for_plot, aes(x = group, y = Proportion, fill = group)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Estimated Neuron Proportions between Groups",
    y = "Estimated Proportion of Neurons",
    x = "Group"
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(
      method = "anova",
      label.x = 3.8) 
print(neuron_plot)

ggsave(
  filename = "../results/figures/cell_type_plots/cell_type_neuron_plot.png",
  plot = neuron_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

for_plot <- props_long %>%
  filter(CellType == "Astro")
for_plot$group<- factor(for_plot$group,
  levels = c("control_no_exercise",
             "control_exercise",
             "MPTP_no_exercise",
             "MPTP_exercise"))
astro_plot <- ggplot(for_plot, aes(x = group, y = Proportion, fill = group)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Estimated Astrocyte Proportions between Groups",
    y = "Estimated Proportion of Astrocytes",
    x = "Group"
  ) + 
  stat_compare_means(
      method = "anova",
      label.x = 3.8) 
print(astro_plot)
ggsave(
  filename = "../results/figures/cell_type_plots/cell_type_astrocyte_plot.png",
  plot = astro_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r variance}
est_props$group <- metadata$group
est_props %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(var_astro = var(Astro),
            var_neuron = var(Neuron))
# cell type composition is not more variable in MPTP exercise compared to other groups
```


```{r}
# ---- plotting function ----
plot_celltype <- function(df, celltype, ylab, title) {
  df %>%
    filter(CellType == celltype) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = group, y = Proportion, fill = group)) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = c("control_no_exercise" = "Saline", "control_exercise" = "Saline + Exercise", "MPTP_no_exercise" = "MPTP", "MPTP_exercise" = "MPTP + Exercise")) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.9) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = NULL,
      y = ylab
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1)
    ) +
    stat_compare_means(method = "anova", label.y = max(df$Proportion) * 1.05) +
    stat_compare_means(method = "t.test",
                       comparisons = list(
                         c("Control\nNo Ex", "MPTP\nNo Ex"),
                         c("Control\nExercise", "MPTP\nExercise")
                       ),
                       label = "p.signif")
}

# ---- generate plots ----
props_long$group <- factor(props_long$group, levels = c("control_no_exercise","control_exercise", "MPTP_no_exercise","MPTP_exercise"))
neuron_plot <- plot_celltype(
  props_long,
  "Neuron",
  "Estimated Proportion",
  "Neuron Proportions Across Groups"
)

astro_plot <- plot_celltype(
  props_long,
  "Astro",
  "Estimated Proportion",
  "Astrocyte Proportions Across Groups"
)

# ---- save ----
ggsave("../results/figures/cell_type_plots/neuron_plot.png",
       neuron_plot, width = 6, height = 5)

ggsave("../results/figures/cell_type_plots/astro_plot.png",
       astro_plot, width = 6, height = 5)
```
